masthead_subtitle: FILES THE GOVERNMENT WOULD PREFER YOU DIDN'T READ
prestige_confirm_body: Lore Inheritance carries forward. Reaching the end of the chain loops you back to the deep woods — older legends, fresh notebook, every technique you ever learned still in your pocket.
reveal_placeholder_text: Another redacted file slips out from under the door.
prestige_ready_toast: The next investigation is ready. Begin again whenever you'd like.
